codeReview.summary: The fix-sync-stubs feature successfully addresses the blocking issue from sync-system. The stub implementation of syncItemToRemote() that only logged has been replaced with actual file sync using fs.copyFileSync. The implementation includes helper functions for determining local/remote database paths and creating remote directories as needed. For transaction modules (kas/bank/gudang), master databases (coa, aspek_kerja, blok) are also synced. Build and lint validations pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker encountered TypeScript compilation issues with template literals when trying to implement the fix. The transcript shows multiple attempts to diagnose the issue (checking for BOM, file encoding, etc.) before resolving by using string concatenation instead. This workaround was not documented in any skill file but the issue was eventually resolved.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: 'Has BOM: false', 'git checkout HEAD', then using string concatenation (' + module + ') instead of template literals (${module})

summary: The fix adequately addresses the original failure. The blocking issue where syncItemToRemote() was a stub that only logged has been resolved. The new implementation uses fs.copyFileSync to actually copy database files to configured remote paths. Helper functions (getLocalDatabasePath, getRemoteDatabasePath, ensureRemoteDirectory) correctly determine paths for each module type. For transaction modules, master databases are also synced. The build passes successfully.
